title: Vietnamese Chicken Crisp Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir-fry made with chicken, crisp noodles, and Vietnamese-inspired flavors. Perfect for a weeknight dinner!
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the garlic and ginger to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the crisp noodles to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the Vietnamese sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the noodles and sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Note: If using a wok, cook the chicken and noodles in batches to prevent overcrowding.
